feat.name: Healing Sanctuary
feat.text: When you call upon your deity’s power, you also radiate a sense of safety that fortifies your allies. An ally who begins their turn in your Shield the Faithful aura gains 10 temporary Hit Points that last for 1 round.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.
